message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Eurobarometer 92.4 (2019)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13529","justification":"Includes media usage, communication, and language-related items; covers multiple EU countries (including Germany, France, Spain, Italy, etc.) in 2019."},{"title":"Eurobarometer 88.3 (2017)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13216","justification":"Contains questions on media, communication, and language-related issues; fielded in 2017 across many EU member states including those requested."},{"title":"Eurobarometer 80.0 (2013)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.11760","justification":"Surveys media use and communication channels within the EU, including Belgium, Germany, Spain, Greece, France, and other listed countries during the 2010s."},{"title":"Eurobarometer 82.3 (2014)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12213","justification":"Contains modules on media use, communication, and language/translation topics; covers EU member states in 2014."},{"title":"Eurobarometer 77.4 (2012)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.11442","justification":"Includes media and communication indicators across many European countries such as Germany, France, Italy, Spain and others in the early 2010s."},{"title":"Eurobarometer 73.1 (2010)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.10018","justification":"Provides data on media exposure and communication preferences in EU member states in 2010, matching the 2010s period and requested countries."},{"title":"Special Eurobarometer 386: Europeans and their Languages (2012)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.11620","justification":"Focused on language skills, use, and attitudes in EU countries including the listed states; directly relevant to language and linguistics in the 2010s."},{"title":"Special Eurobarometer 386 (ZA5565) – GESIS Landing Page","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA5565","justification":"GESIS study page for ‘Europeans and their Languages’, providing access to detailed documentation and data on language use and skills in EU member states in 2012."},{"title":"Media Pluralism Monitor (MPM) 2016 – GESIS Study","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA6832","justification":"Examines media pluralism, media systems, and related indicators in EU countries including many listed (Germany, France, Italy, Spain, etc.) during the 2010s."},{"title":"Media Pluralism Monitor (MPM) 2017 – GESIS Study","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA7491","justification":"Provides country-level data on media environments and pluralism across EU member states in 2017, relevant to media studies in the specified European countries during the 2010s."}]}
